meanings.definition: fix or determine the value of; assign a value to
examples: value the jewelry and art work in the estate

meanings.definition: evaluate or estimate the nature, quality, ability, extent, or significance of
examples: I will have the family jewels appraised by a professional
access all the factors when taking a risk
How would you rate his chances to become President?
Gold was rated highly among the Romans

meanings.definition: (usually used in combination) having value of a specified kind
held in great esteem for admirable qualities especially of an intrinsic nature
